## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.4

### Cameras
- Switches the camera history poll to the APK playback/library record endpoint used by the X-Sense app.
- Keeps regular camera motion polling active when the AI service list is empty.
- Matches the APK video-history filter shape with serial numbers, time range, page bounds, empty tags, and unmarked records.

### Debug
- Starts the lightweight camera history poll immediately when the integration loads instead of waiting for the next interval.
- Logs whether camera history polling started, skipped for missing client/cameras/serials/services, refreshed auth, failed, or applied records.
- Renames the camera history debug messages from event history to record history to match the APK path being used.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the APK camera record-history endpoint and request body.
- Adds coverage that the camera history poll starts immediately and logs the no-camera skip path.
